title: GUAM TE'N MUAL TE KIPSAK THEI AI VE

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mual tungah ih din teh nuam mah si ee
Ih khan zong suak ta in nuam sa veh
Pasian tawh a kinai pha diak tawh kibang ee
A bawl sa a khutmaa ih muh teh

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Guam te'n mual te kipsak thei bek ai ve
Sang kah leng hong hat sak semsem ta
Topa lunggulh hun te lungdam huai gige
Guam sung ih tot ciang hong nuam sak se

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mual te guam tawh kidim ih nun sung teng
Nop hun leh lung kiat hun ih thuak zel
Nop sak hun lungkiat hun phu kha mah ta se leng
Tua hun ciang na ngawn in hong kem lel

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khat vei ciang guam cih bang om nawn ke'n teh
Zion mual tung ah ih kah tak ciang
A etlawm vantung gam ih muh ciang nuam se'n teh
Hun in hong su vet lo ding tua ciang
